signature: ai.text.aggregateCompletion(value :: STRING, prompt :: STRING, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: STRING
name: ai.text.aggregateCompletion
description: Generate text based on the specified prompt.

argumentDescription.name: value
argumentDescription.description: The value to aggregate over.

argumentDescription.name: prompt
argumentDescription.description: The prompt to generate text from.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'Bedrock', 'Bedrock-Nova', 'Bedrock-Titan', 'OpenAI', 'VertexAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.completion.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: ai.text.aggregateStructuredCompletion(value :: STRING, prompt :: STRING, schema :: MAP, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: MAP
name: ai.text.aggregateStructuredCompletion
description: Generate text based on the specified prompt.

argumentDescription.name: value
argumentDescription.description: The value to aggregate over.

argumentDescription.name: prompt
argumentDescription.description: The prompt to generate text from.

argumentDescription.name: schema
argumentDescription.description: A map describing the JSON schema for the desired output.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'Bedrock', 'Bedrock-Nova', 'Bedrock-Titan', 'OpenAI', 'VertexAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.structuredCompletion.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: ai.text.chat(prompt :: STRING, chatId :: STRING, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: MAP
name: ai.text.chat
description: Chat based on the specified prompt, optionally continuing a previous interaction.

argumentDescription.name: prompt
argumentDescription.description: The user message to send.

argumentDescription.name: chatId
argumentDescription.description: Previous chat ID to continue the conversation. If this is the first message in the conversation, set it to null.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'OpenAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.chat.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: ai.text.completion(prompt :: STRING, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: STRING
name: ai.text.completion
description: Generate text based on the specified prompt.

argumentDescription.name: prompt
argumentDescription.description: The prompt to generate text from.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'Bedrock', 'Bedrock-Nova', 'Bedrock-Titan', 'OpenAI', 'VertexAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.completion.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: ai.text.embed(resource :: STRING, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: VECTOR
name: ai.text.embed
description: Encode a given resource as a vector using the named provider.

argumentDescription.name: resource
argumentDescription.description: The object to transform into an embedding.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'Bedrock-Titan', 'OpenAI', 'VertexAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.embed.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: ai.text.structuredCompletion(prompt :: STRING, schema :: MAP, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: MAP) :: MAP
name: ai.text.structuredCompletion
description: Generate structured output as a map based on the specified prompt and JSON schema.

argumentDescription.name: prompt
argumentDescription.description: The prompt to generate output from.

argumentDescription.name: schema
argumentDescription.description: A map describing the JSON schema for the desired output.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: 'Azure-OpenAI', 'Bedrock', 'OpenAI', 'VertexAI'.

argumentDescription.name: configuration
argumentDescription.description: Provider specific configuration, use `CALL ai.text.structuredCompletion.providers()` to find the configuration needed for each provider. You can specify additional vendor options by adding `vendorOptions` with a map of values that will be passed along in the request.

signature: genai.vector.encode(resource :: STRING, provider :: STRING, configuration = {} :: ANY) :: ANY
name: genai.vector.encode
description: Encode a given resource as a vector using the named provider.

argumentDescription.name: resource
argumentDescription.description: The object to transform into an embedding.

argumentDescription.name: provider
argumentDescription.description: The identifier of the provider: ("VertexAI", "OpenAI", "AzureOpenAI", "Bedrock").

argumentDescription.name: configuration
